prompt: Generate a detailed computer graphics render. Use the reference image as a depth map to define the spatial relationships and arrangement of organic forms in a realistic 3D scene, simulating real-world depth with intricate details.
prompt_refined: Generate a detailed computer graphics render of a realistic 3D scene. Utilize image 1 as a depth map to precisely define the spatial relationships and arrangement of organic botanical forms. Ensure the large, prominent foreground shapes indicated by the bright areas in image 1 are rendered as intricate floral elements, while the darker, less defined background areas are rendered as distant foliage or other organic mass, simulating real-world depth and intricate details throughout the scene.
objects: intricate floral elements in the foreground
